reasoning: The anchor says NASA/JPL reported on March 5, 2025 that engineers turned off Voyager 1’s cosmic ray subsystem on Feb. 25, 2025 as a power-conservation measure, with three instruments remaining on each spacecraft. Content A directly contains that exact fact in both the CNN snippet and especially the JPL/NASA result, including the shutdown date, instrument name, purpose (conserve power), and the associated Voyager 2 action.
